mapper.insert: INSERT INTO app_generation_stat_event ( task_id, source_type, source_id, event_day, status, channel, model, created_at, updated_at ) SELECT t.id, 'TASK', t.id, DATE(COALESCE(t.queued_at, t.started_at, t.finished_at, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP)), #{status}, t.channel, t.model, COALESCE(t.queued_at, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP), CURRENT_TIMESTAMP FROM app_generation_task t WHERE t.id = #{taskId} ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE event_day = VALUES(event_day), status = VALUES(status), channel = COALESCE(VALUES(channel), app_generation_stat_event.channel), model = COALESCE(VALUES(model), app_generation_stat_event.model), updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
